targets.query:
from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_percent")
  |> group()
  |> mean()
  |> yield(name: "total_cpu")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage")
  |> group()
  |> sum()
  |> yield(name: "total_mem")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "app_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_votes")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "votes")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "app_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "session_tokens")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "tokens")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_cpu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage_percent")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "cpu")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_mem")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "usage")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "mem")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "app_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "memory_heapUsed" or r._field == "memory_heapTotal" or r._field == "memory_rss")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "heap")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "app_metrics")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "uptime" or r._field == "session_nodes" or r._field == "session_likes" or r._field == "session_comments")
  |> last()
  |> yield(name: "stats")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rx_bytes")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "rx")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_net")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "tx_bytes")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "tx")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_blkio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "io_service_bytes_recursive_read")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "read")

from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "docker_container_blkio")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "io_service_bytes_recursive_write")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "container_name"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "write")
